'''Kline''' was a [[Technician/Legends|technician]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Anselm]]. Anselm selected him to be on the team that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] brought along to the [[Katana fleet]]. He was tasked with restoring the [[Computer/Legends|computer]] systems aboard the fleet.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
